creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

If you do not setup a MBR section that boots the disk, and there is 
something else that can be booted from, you will see this indeed. 
That will happen with all loaders, somethiing has to be found before 
you can start it, it will look at the MBR first and start that or 
from another boot-capable device, which seems to be your controller's 
setup screen. This is not a freebsd problem.
